description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages: relay and sds. In the relay stage add a relay job that uses the dutov/dmd Docker image, runs `cd RTSrtorrentRelay`, then `apt-get update && apt-get -y install libssl-dev libevent-dev`, and finally `dub -v build`; it uploads the file `RTSrtorrentRelay/rtsrtorrentrelay` as an artifact. In the sds stage add an sds job that uses the mono Docker image, runs `apt-get update`, `apt-get -y install git`, `git clone https://gitlab.com/wdd/rt-sharp.git ../rtsharp`, `cd ../rtsharp/RTSharpPlugin`, `nuget install packages.config`, `cd ../../rtsharp-rtorrent-sds/RTSharp-rtorrent-SDS`, `nuget install packages.config`, and `xbuild /t:Build /p:Configuration=Debug /p:Platform="AnyCPU" RTSharp-rtorrent-SDS.csproj`; it uploads the file `RTSharp-rtorrent-SDS/bin/Debug/RTSharp-rtorrent-SDS.dll` as an artifact.
